codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix commit addresses the prior blocking gaps: rendered-indicator tests now assert concrete display/accessibility seam values, cross-surface switch-sync tests invoke UI action seams instead of direct store switching for the primary action, and VAL-CROSS-009 tests execute launch paths and assert invocation traces via getLastAttemptedProfileID.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill requires explicit context-read evidence before setting followedProcedure=true, but this handoff marks followedProcedure=true without command evidence that Phase 1.1 context files were read.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/switcher-integration-worker/SKILL.md ('Context Read Evidence for followedProcedure=true'); handoff 2026-04-10T16-22-32-728Z__integration-hardening-crossflow-proof-v2-with-auditable-diff__8d014f6d-b88d-47a6-8ad7-1d1e93b4ffba.json has skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true and verification.commandsRun entries only for test commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Crossflow UI seam tests rely on repeated testTriggerReload() after testTriggerSelectAndSwitch due view-state seam behavior, but this caveat is not captured in shared architecture/testing guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit 3dc5fc2 diff in AgentLensTests/Active/SwitcherCrossFlowTests.swift adds repeated reload calls with comments explaining performSwitch() early-return behavior when selectedProfileID == activeProfileID.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, fix handoff/transcript skeleton, worker skill, mission shared-state docs, and both diffs (failed commit 01921b8cc62428f51cc6819bb7579d5db2ca4a90 and fix commit 3dc5fc2d35c013d8ac1e1ebee95009acfd579ee7). The fix adequately resolves the original failure: concrete rendered seam assertions are present, primary switch proofs are UI-action-seam driven, and launch routing is proven through concrete invocation traces.
